portalUrl.description: Base URL of the Data Fair portal. Required in standalone mode (stdio transport).

dataFairAPIKey.description: API key sent to Data Fair for authentication. Used in standalone mode.

ignoreRateLimiting.description: Secret key sent to Data Fair to bypass rate limiting constraints. Used in stack mode.

defaultLimits.description: Default rate limiting configuration for the MCP server front-facing API.

duration.description: Duration of the rate limiting window in seconds.

nb.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per duration window.
